VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
3 ETPs to Play Buffett's Moat Advantage

holdings.infoBox: MOTI is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 3.92%, James Hardie Industries at 3.40%, Symrise AG at 3.20%, DSM-Firmenich AG at 3.19%, and Ambev at 3.16%.

overview.description: The VanEck Morningstar International Moat ETF (MOTI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 50 non-US companies that Morningstar deems to have a sustainable competitive advantage and an attractive valuation. MOTI was launched on Jul 14, 2015 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: Morningstar Global Markets ex-US Wide Moat Focus PR USD

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: 3 ETPs to Play Buffett's Moat Advantage
data.text: Learn about Warren Buffett's "moat" investment strategy and discover three ETPs that provide exposure to companies with an economic moat.
